description_long: This is a wooden slat bench with a simple, modern design, featuring three horizontal wooden slats forming the backrest and three wider wooden planks making up the seat. The bench is supported by two sturdy, rectangular wooden legs at each end, with visible metal brackets providing additional structural support and stability. The wood has a dark brown finish, giving it a classic and natural appearance suitable for urban parks or sidewalks. The metal brackets are a muted gray, contrasting subtly with the wood and adding a touch of industrial style. The bench lacks armrests, emphasizing a minimalist and functional aesthetic. Its open slat design allows for water drainage and airflow, making it well-suited for outdoor environments.
description: A dark brown wooden slat bench with a backrest, supported by rectangular legs and gray metal brackets, designed for outdoor urban use. The bench has a minimalist, open design with no armrests.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the three horizontal wooden backrest slats and the supporting metal brackets.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden seat planks and the depth of the bench.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full width of the seat and backrest, with all slats and legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the seat planks and the bench's depth.
attribute_leg_design: two rectangular wooden legs with metal bracket supports
